title: DHS Expands Counter-Drone Authority for Critical Infrastructure
summary: The Department of Homeland Security has issued new directives expanding counter-UAS authorities for critical infrastructure operators, signaling a major shift in how facilities can defend against drone threats.

title: Joint Interagency Task Force Announces Unified Drone Defense Framework
summary: A new multi-agency framework establishes standardized protocols for counter-UAS operations across federal, state, and local jurisdictions.

title: One Big Beautiful Bill Allocates $2.4B for Autonomous Defense
summary: The latest defense appropriations bill includes significant funding for autonomous counter-drone systems, AI-powered threat detection, and rapid prototyping of unmanned platforms.

title: US Launches One-Way-Attack Drone Force in the Pacific Theater
summary: The Department of War has deployed its first operational one-way-attack drone formation, marking a paradigm shift in autonomous weapons doctrine.

title: Why Legacy cUAS Systems Are Failing Against Modern Drone Swarms
summary: An analysis of recent incidents reveals that static, signature-based defense systems are fundamentally incapable of adapting to the evolving autonomous threat landscape.

title: NDAA Compliance: What Critical Infrastructure Operators Need to Know
summary: New NDAA provisions are reshaping procurement requirements for counter-drone systems. Here is what CIOs and security directors need to understand about supply chain compliance.
